mainEntity.name: Can NRIs register an OPC in Mumbai?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. The Companies (Amendment) Act, 2021 allows NRIs and foreign residents to incorporate OPCs in India. The nominee must be an Indian resident. Virtual Auditor handles NRI-specific OPC incorporation including FEMA compliance.

mainEntity.name: What is the annual compliance for an OPC?

acceptedAnswer.text: OPC has simplified compliance: AOC-4 filing (annual financial statements), MGT-7A (simplified annual return), DIR-3 KYC, income tax return, and one board meeting per half-year. No AGM is required. We offer annual compliance packages.

mainEntity.name: How long does OPC registration take in Mumbai?

acceptedAnswer.text: 5-7 working days from SPICe+ filing. Total timeline including DSC, DIN, and name reservation: 7-10 working days.
